---
title: "Tier 4 — Pre-Calculus and Calculus"
subtitle: "Grade 12 · planned, not yet built"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This tier is **planned but not yet authored.** See [`_curriculum.yml`](/_curriculum.yml)
for the topic plan and the [Home page](/index.qmd) for build status.
:::

## Planned scope

Limits and continuity · derivatives and applications · integrals and the
fundamental theorem · vectors in 2D and 3D (the first explicit Game Dev
bridge) · introduction to differential equations.

[← Back to Home](/index.qmd)
